topStories.title: ‘Closer to a break than ever’: Can NATO survive if Trump pulls the US out?
topStories.description: The war in Iran has deepened a rift in the transatlantic alliance, raising questions about whether it can endure.

topStories.title: ‘Biggest infiltrator come from Gujarat’: Kanhaiya's veiled jibe at Amit Shah in Assam rally
topStories.description: In a veiled jibe at Union Minister Amit Shah, the Congress leader called on the voters to drive infiltrators from Gujarat out of the state.

topStories.title: Cuban president defiant despite Trump pressure to resign
topStories.description: Miguel Diaz-Canel vows to resist US pressure as Trump escalates threats, tightens oil blockade on the island.

topStories.title: Supreme Court refuses to entertain bail plea of suspended Punjab Police DIG in corruption case
topStories.description: While dismissing his bail plea, the high court had granted him liberty to apply for bail afresh before the special court after the examination of material witnesses in the case

dailyNews.description: Vance also said that Trump "gave us some pretty clear guidelines" on how talks should go, but he didn't elaborate.

dailyNews.title: US consumer prices increased 3.3% in March amid high oil prices linked to Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: The Labor Department’s Bureau of Labor Statistics reported on Friday that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) climbed 0.9% last month, the biggest increase since June 2022, when prices surged in response to the Russia-Ukraine war.

dailyNews.title: Wildfires Race Across US as Drought Spans Half the Nation
dailyNews.description: An unusually hot, snowless winter has fueled a fast start to the spring fire season across large swaths of the western, central and southeastern US, disrupting businesses and upending daily life.

dailyNews.title: Kamal Kharazi, former Iranian foreign minister, dies week after he was injured in US-Israeli strikes
dailyNews.description: Kamal Kharazi, former Iranian foreign minister, died from injuries sustained in US-Israeli airstrikes on April 1. He was 81 and head of the Strategic Council for International Relations. He previously represented Iran at the UN in New York and later served as foreign minister from 1997 to 2005

dailyNews.title: What are today's mortgage and mortgage refinance interest rates?
dailyNews.description: Knowing today's mortgage rates can help new homebuyers and homeowners looking to lock in a good deal.

dailyNews.description: Silver can play a critical role in a diversified portfolio. Here's how much it costs per ounce right now.

dailyNews.description: These charts track prices consumers pay for groceries and other goods now compared to five years ago.

dailyNews.description: Understanding the pricing trends and dynamics of the gold market is crucial for making sound financial choices.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down Melania Trump's remarks denying Epstein links
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump held remarks on Thursday denying any link to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. CBS News' Caitlin Huey-Burns reports.

dailyNews.title: "48 Hours:" Case By Case: The biggest cases, explained as they unfold
dailyNews.description: The cases everyone's talking about, explained as they happen. A weekly update on the biggest criminal stories unfolding now.

dailyNews.title: Live Updates:  U.S., Iran prepare for talks as shaky ceasefire holds
dailyNews.description: The U.S. and Iran are getting ready for talks Saturday in Islamabad, Pakistan, as their tenuous ceasefire held despite key sticking points.

dailyNews.title: Inflation surged in March as Iran war drove up energy costs
dailyNews.description: Inflation rose at an annual rate of 3.3% in March, driven by the sharpest monthly increase in gas prices since 1967.

dailyNews.title: Texas mom's remains discovered in a hidden grave decades after her disappearance
dailyNews.description: Tiffani McInnis was a teenager in Texas when her mother, Kimberly Langwell, failed to return home from work, leaving her family searching for answers. More than 20 years later, detectives investigating the case received critical information that would finally reveal Langwell's fate. Peter Van Sant has a preview.

topStories.title: Trump blasts Iran over Strait of Hormuz access as Vance travels for Pakistan talks
topStories.description: President Trump posted claims on social media that Iran is doing a "very poor job" of allowing oil through the Strait of Hormuz. This comes as U.S. representatives prepare to hold talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, with Iranian officials. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi, Imtiaz Tyab and Ramy Inocencio report.

topStories.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges Congress to have hearing for survivors
topStories.description: First lady Melania Trump pushed back on what she called "fake images and statements" appearing to connect her to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The first lady also said survivors should have the opportunity to testify and tell their stories before Congress.

topStories.title: Dems dodge on Trump removal as party weighs 25th Amendment move
topStories.description: House Democrats are weighing a long-shot 25th Amendment effort to oust President Trump, though they lack the Republican support needed to succeed.

dailyNews.title: Ivanka Trump recalls the moment her father was shot in Butler, Pennsylvania
dailyNews.description: Ivanka Trump describes the assassination attempt on her father as incredibly difficult but says she chooses gratitude because he survived that day.

dailyNews.title: Nation’s second-largest school district targeted by Trump over secretive trans policy
dailyNews.description: The Los Angeles Unified School District faces a DOJ investigation over a policy that allegedly lets staff withhold students' gender identity from parents.

dailyNews.title: AMB GORDON SONDLAND: NATO blinked on Iran, and Trump has every right to be furious
dailyNews.description: A former U.S. ambassador to the EU argues NATO's hesitation after strikes on Iran emboldens adversaries and erodes the credibility of Western deterrence.

dailyNews.title: The Mass Purge of Immigration Judges, and Melania Trump’s Surprise Epstein Remarks
dailyNews.description: Plus, your Friday news quiz.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Changes Lock Some Employers Out of H-1B Visa Program
dailyNews.description: Since imposing a $100,000 fee on new visas in September, the Trump administration has upended the skilled worker program.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Returns to Court for Yet Another Tariff Lawsuit
dailyNews.description: States and small businesses challenged the 10 percent tax on many imports that President Trump imposed after the Supreme Court struck down a previous slate of tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Where Mail Voting Began, Worries Spread Over Trump’s Attacks
dailyNews.description: In the Pacific Northwest, mail-in ballots have been the norm for decades, but President Trump’s war on such voting has turned a point of regional pride into another partisan battle line.

dailyNews.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes Further Threatening Ceasefire
dailyNews.description: New Israeli strikes in Lebanon targeting what it says is the Iran-backed militia Hezbollah are threatening the fragile ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran. Leaders of Iran say Lebanon is an inseparable part of the ceasefire, which the U.S. and Israel dispute. It comes as the White House team is set to meet Iranian officials in Pakistan for talks this weekend. NBC’s Stephanie Gosk reports for TODAY from Tel Aviv.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Cuban president reacts to Trump admin’s call for him to step down
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel says "stepping down [is] not part of our vocabulary" amid reports that the U.S. government has asked the Cuban leader to resign.

dailyNews.title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair confirmation plan hits snag as nomination hearing is delayed
dailyNews.description: President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current Chair Jerome Powell.
